---
title: "An R package for integrating pre-trained models into epidemiological time series forecasting"
author:
  - name: Thiyanga S. Talagala
    orcid: 0000-0002-0656-9789
    affiliations:
      - "Department of Statistics, Faculty of Applied Sciences, University of Sri Jayewardenepura, Sri Lanka"

date: today
date-format: iso
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
  hikmah-pdf:
    geometry:
      - left=1.25in
      - right=1.25in
bibliography: references.bib
---

_This template was last revised on 2026-03-24._


{{< include proposal/00-exec-summary.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/01-signatories.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/02-problemdefinition.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/03-proposal.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/04-timeline.qmd >}}

{{< include proposal/05-success.qmd >}}

::: refs
:::
